surface.name: Inference Providers chat completions via cURL (HF token + monthly credits)
surface.selection_basis: Hugging Face Inference Providers docs document direct HTTP/cURL to https://router.huggingface.co/v1/chat/completions with Authorization: Bearer $HF_TOKEN. Pricing docs state every user receives monthly credits for routed requests, and pay-as-you-go credit purchase is required after free monthly credits are exhausted. An SDK install is not required.

alternatives_considered.name: Python InferenceClient / huggingface_hub
alternatives_considered.reason_not_primary: Optional convenience client against the same OpenAI-compatible router endpoint.

alternatives_considered.name: Create a Hub model repository
alternatives_considered.reason_not_primary: Hub artifact publishing is not the hosted inference first API call.

alternatives_considered.name: Transformers local quick tour
alternatives_considered.reason_not_primary: Local library workflow rather than authenticated Inference Providers HTTPS.

entry_point.developer_intent: Create a Hugging Face account and fine-grained token, confirm usable Inference Providers credits, and receive a chat completions JSON result over HTTPS.
assumed_prior_state: No Hugging Face account, User Access Token, or Inference Providers request is assumed.
A terminal with cURL is available; no language SDK is assumed.

documented_first_success.official_milestone: Inference Providers HTTP chat completions call
documented_first_success.normalized_outcome: An authenticated cURL POST to https://router.huggingface.co/v1/chat/completions returns model message JSON.
documented_first_success.observable_completion_signal: The chat completions response includes choices with assistant message content for the requested prompt.

boundary_evidence.official_label_or_terminal_state: Inference Providers Getting Started documents Authentication with a fine-grained token and an HTTP/cURL POST to https://router.huggingface.co/v1/chat/completions with Authorization: Bearer $HF_TOKEN.

documented_first_success.why_this_is_the_boundary: The first meaningful hosted inference success is an authenticated chat completions response. cURL is documented on the same page as SDK clients. Monthly free credits apply to HF-routed requests; after exhaustion, pay-as-you-go credit purchase is required per Pricing and Hub billing docs.

prerequisites.requirement: A Hugging Face account that can open token settings and billing.

Usable Inference Providers credits for HF-routed requests. Free users receive monthly credits ($0.10 subject to change); after exhaustion, purchase additional credits (payment method via billing settings) for pay-as-you-go.
A fine-grained User Access Token with Make calls to Inference Providers permission.
A terminal with cURL (or any HTTP client). No language SDK is required.

primary_path.action: Create or sign in to a Hugging Face account.
primary_path.success_signal: Token settings and billing settings are reachable.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: Account recovery follows the Hub sign-in flow.

primary_path.action: Confirm usable Inference Providers monthly credits, or add a payment method and purchase credits if monthly credits are exhausted.
details: Free users receive monthly credits for HF-routed Inference Providers requests.
Hub billing documents credit cards for compute pay-as-you-go and credit purchase when credits run out.
primary_path.success_signal: Billing shows remaining monthly credits or purchased credits for Inference Providers.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: Exhausted credits without purchase block further pay-as-you-go inference.

primary_path.action: Create a fine-grained token with Make calls to Inference Providers and store it securely.
details: Export the token as HF_TOKEN for the documented cURL example.
primary_path.success_signal: The token is generated and available locally.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: A token without Inference Providers permission cannot call the router.

primary_path.output: Token available to HTTP clients in the shell
primary_path.success_signal: The environment variable is set for the current shell.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: Shell persistence depends on the OS.

primary_path.action: POST a chat completions request with cURL to https://router.huggingface.co/v1/chat/completions.
details: Include Authorization: Bearer $HF_TOKEN and Content-Type: application/json.
Send messages and a model id as shown in the Inference Providers HTTP/cURL example (for example openai/gpt-oss-120b:fastest).
primary_path.success_signal: The API returns successful JSON with assistant message content.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: Missing token, exhausted credits, or invalid JSON produce API errors.

primary_path.action: Confirm the chat completions JSON includes the model message content.
primary_path.success_signal: Assistant message content is present in choices.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: An error body means the first call did not succeed.

branches.path: Skip purchasing additional credits while monthly credits remain usable for HF-routed requests.
branches.effect_on_first_success: Credit purchase may be deferred only while monthly credits remain.

branches.condition: The developer prefers an official SDK instead of cURL.
branches.path: Use InferenceClient or an OpenAI-compatible client pointed at https://router.huggingface.co/v1 with the same HF token.
branches.effect_on_first_success: Adds optional package installation without changing the authenticated chat completions boundary.

friction_gates.description: After monthly free credits are exhausted, additional Inference Providers usage requires purchasing credits with a payment method.
A fine-grained token with Inference Providers permission is required.

sources.title: Inference Providers
evidence_supported: Fine-grained token with Inference Providers permission

sources.title: Pricing and Billing
evidence_supported: Credit purchase required after monthly credits for continued usage

sources.title: Billing
evidence_supported: Credits cover Inference Providers among other compute services

uncertainties.question: Whether every brand-new Free account still has non-zero monthly Inference Providers credits at signup versus needing an immediate credit purchase.
uncertainties.impact: Billing purchase may precede or follow the first successful chat completions call.
uncertainties.reason_unresolved: Pricing states monthly credits exist but eligibility timing for brand-new accounts is not fully enumerated on these pages.
